    • Access for ACT Network members

Build project namespace

Source: R/zzz_utils.R
build_namespace.Rd

Most project files are saved under /data/repository/{project}. Some networks, namely ATAP, MigraMar and NEP, are directly hosted by OTN and so have their files saved under /data/repository/{network}/{project}. This function does some light cleaning of the project code and adjusts for these OTN-hosted networks.

Usage

build_namespace(project)

Arguments

project

Character. The project code.

On this page
